paper_title: Estimates of common ragweed pollen emission and dispersion over Europe using RegCM-pollen model

methods.description: Development of a pollen model for ragweed within the RegCM4 framework to calculate seasonal pollen production, emission, and atmospheric processes.

steps.description: Develop a pollen model for ragweed which calculates the seasonal production of pollen grains and their emission and atmospheric processes.

steps.description: Pollen production is developed in the framework of the Community Land Model (CLM) version 4.5.

methods.method_name: Model Setup for Ragweed Pollen Simulations
methods.description: Setup of the RegCM-pollen model for simulating ragweed pollen over a European domain with specific atmospheric and land surface configurations.

steps.description: Ragweed pollen simulations are carried out for a European domain with specific horizontal resolution and atmospheric layers.

steps.description: Initial and lateral atmospheric boundary conditions are provided by ERA-Interim analysis.

steps.description: Weekly SSTs are obtained from the NOAA optimum interpolation (OI) SST analysis.

steps.description: Integrate the model continuously throughout the year for simulating ragweed phenology.

methods.description: Evaluation of the model performance by comparing modeled to observed airborne pollen concentrations using statistical analysis.

steps.description: Present an overview of model performance using a Taylor diagram.
